title: Ventral Midbrain Genomic PCR
steps: Euthanize mouse via cervical dislocation.
Isolate 2 mm coronal midbrain section using stainless steel brain matrix (Stoelting 51386).
Remove cortex and dorsal midbrain tissue.
Separate ipsilateral and contralateral ventral midbrain regions.
Immediately freeze on dry ice and store tissue at -80 °C until DNA extraction.
Use Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit (Cat 69504).
Equilibrate ventral midbrain tissue to Room temperature . Starting material amount ~ 15 mg of tissue.
Cut tissue into small pieces.
Use a pipette tip to transfer tissue to a sterile 6cm dish.
Add 180 µL of Buffer ATL to the tissue.
Dice up tissue with sterile scalpel.
Transfer tissue and buffer to 1.5mL etube.
Add 20 µL Proteinase K to each sample.
Mix thoroughly by vortexing.
Incubate at 56 °C until samples are completely lysed. Use thermomixer – check samples after 01:00:00 , may take up to 03:00:00 .
Add 4 µL RNase A ( 100 mg/ml ) to each sample.
Mix by vortexing.
Incubate at Room temperature for 00:02:00 .
Mix Buffer AL with ethanol 1:1.
Add 400 µL Buffer AL / ethanol mix to each sample.
Vortex for 00:00:15 .
Transfer samples to DNeasy Mini spin columns (placed in 2mL collection tubes).
Centrifuge at ≥ 6000 x g, , for 00:01:00 .
Discard flow through.
Transfer column to new collection tube.
Add 500 µL Buffer AW1.
Centrifuge at ≥ 6000 x g, , for 00:01:00 .
Discard flow through and collection tube.
Place the column in a new collection tube – add 500 µL Buffer AW2.
Centrifuge 20000 x g, , for 00:03:00 to dry the column.
Carefully remove the column to avoid contamination with residual ethanol.
If the column touches ethanol flow through, spin again in new collection tube for 00:01:00 .
Place the column in clean 1.5mL etube – add 150 µL of elution buffer (Buffer AE).
Incubate at Room temperature for 00:01:00 .
Centrifuge at ≥ 6000 x g, , for 00:01:00 to elute DNA.
DNA concentration measured using a NanoDrop One Spectrophotometer (Thermofisher Scientfiic).
All samples diluted to 25 ng/μl with Buffer AE.

Use the Kapa2g Fast HotStart PCR Kit (Roche 07960930001) according to the manufacturer’s instructions. %s %s PCR Cycle: A B C D 1 Step Temp (°C) Time Note 2 1 94.0 °C 5 min. 3 2 94.0 °C 30 sec. 4 3 65.0 °C 15 sec. -0.5 °C per cycle decrease 5 4 68.0 °C 1 sec. 6 5 repeat steps 2-4 for 10 cycles (touchdown) 7 6 94.0 °C 30 sec. 8 7 60.0 °C 15 sec. 9 8 72.0 °C 1 sec. 10 9 repeat steps 6-8 for 20 cycles 11 10 72.0 °C 5 min. 12 11 4.0 °C hold Hold
Run samples on 2% Agarose gel at 100V for 35-45 minutes. A B 1 Wild type allele 400 bp 2 Flox allele 500 bp 3 KO allele 270 bp
creator: Jane Balster
